diagrams.title: OS Debugging Tools Classification
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchy and categories of debugging tools available for operating system debugging
diagrams.purpose: HELPS UNDERSTAND THE RANGE OF TOOLS AVAILABLE AND WHEN TO USE EACH TYPE

diagrams.title: Deadlock Conditions Diagram
diagrams.description: Visual representation of the four necessary conditions for deadlock
elements: MUTUAL EXCLUSION (Resource can be used by only one process)
HOLD AND WAIT (Process holds resources while waiting)
NO PREEMPTION (Resources cannot be forcibly taken)
CIRCULAR WAIT (Circular chain of waiting processes)
diagrams.purpose: ILLUSTRATES ALL FOUR CONDITIONS THAT MUST BE PRESENT SIMULTANEOUSLY FOR DEADLOCK TO OCCUR

diagrams.title: Kernel Crash Analysis Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process of kernel crash debugging from panic to recovery
diagrams.purpose: PROVIDES SYSTEMATIC APPROACH TO DEBUGGING KERNEL CRASHES AND PREVENTING RECURRENCE
